name: flowguard
description: FlowGuard — water utility management system. React + TypeScript frontend and an Express + TypeScript MVC backend.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
